title: xAI sued for firing an engineer who raised alarms about Grok safety
abstract: xAI sued for firing an engineer who raised alarms about Grok safety may be niche, but it solves its target problem with focus and precision. In the fast-moving AI space, specialized tools often outper...
abstract_zh: xAI告上了法庭，因为它炒了那个担心Grok安全性的工程师。这工具虽小众，但瞄准痛点，出手不凡！在AI这片速战速决的战场上，它就像那藏在角落里的神 sniper，精准制导，笑到最后。
